summary: RCare iteration 4 verified end-to-end. Backend pytest: 42/42 PASSED (5 regression test_api + 14 test_rcare_new + 7 test_rcare_iter3 + 16 NEW test_rcare_iter4). New iter4 coverage: /api/caregivers POST/GET/DELETE with name (incl. empty-name 400 + delete 404), /api/medicines POST/GET/DELETE with name+origin (incl. both-missing 400), /api/medicine-purchases POST/GET/DELETE linked to medicine_id (incl. invalid medicine_id 404 + cascade-delete on medicine removal), insulin/food/water accept optional 'caregiver' and round-trip it on GET (and continue to work without it), /api/reports now returns 'purchases' populated with new purchases inside the week window AND emits 'Sem registro de glicemia/água/alimentação no dia DD/MM/YYYY' concerns for empty custom past ranges. Frontend (Playwright, 390x844 mobile viewport, preview URL https://senior-wellness-app-3.preview.emergentagent.com after expo restart resolved initial ngrok 502): Home renders 6 cards with correct testIDs+labels (INSULINA, ALIMENTAÇÃO, ÁGUA, REMÉDIOS, ASSISTENTE, ADMINISTRADOR). admin-login with 2255 + Enter navigates to /admin which renders 5 cards (Estatísticas, Relatórios PDF, Remédios, Cuidadores, Configurações) with the expected testIDs. Creating a caregiver via /caregivers (cg-name-input + cg-add-btn) persists and appears in list. Creating a medicine via /medicines-admin (med-name-input + med-origin-input + med-add-btn) persists and appears with origin. /medicines screen shows CaregiverPicker at top (chip for the new caregiver is present, 'Cuidador que está registrando' label visible, no empty banner), lists registered medicines including the newly created one, and shows 'Registrar compra' form. Test data cleaned up (TEST_UI_CG_* and TEST_UI_MED_*).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py delete_medicine correctly cascades db.medicine_purchases.delete_many({'medicine_id': mid}) after medicine delete.

/api/reports now adds missing-data concerns for each day in range (<=60 days window) with DD/MM/YYYY formatting via _fmt_br; past-only window (2024-06-01..02) emits 'Sem registro de X no dia DD/MM/YYYY' for glicemia, água and alimentação.

MedicinePurchase stores medicine_name denormalized at creation time, which is used by /medicines UI purchase history — note: if a medicine is renamed, purchases keep the old name (acceptable; deletes cascade anyway).
All six home CARDS have distinct bg colors and matching testIDs (home-insulin-btn/home-food-btn/home-water-btn/home-medicines-btn/home-assistant-btn/home-admin-btn). No FAB remains.
admin.tsx CARDS has exactly 5 entries with testIDs admin-stats-btn/admin-reports-btn/admin-medicines-btn/admin-caregivers-btn/admin-settings-btn.

CaregiverPicker renders chips with testID='caregiver-pick-<name>' and shows 'Nenhum cuidador cadastrado' banner (testID='caregiver-no-registered') when list empty; Medicines screen imports and uses it and also blocks save when !currentCaregiver via Alert.
Password input on /admin-login uses testID 'admin-pwd-input' and Enter submits correctly.
Core record endpoints (insulin/food/water) all accept caregiver as Optional[str] in Create/Upsert models; Upsert path for Food uses exclude_unset=True so caregiver is only overwritten when supplied.
seed_data_creation: During testing, ephemeral records were created and deleted inside each test (TEST_CG_iter4, TEST_MED_iter4, TEST_MED_P_iter4, TEST_REP_MED, TEST_iter4 glucose/food/water). Playwright seeded TEST_UI_CG_<ts> and TEST_UI_MED_<ts> then cleaned them via fetch() on the page (delCg=1, delMed=1 confirmed). No leftover test data; Maria caregiver and Losartana 50mg remain as pre-seeded data from main agent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: export EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=$(grep EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2); pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Admin pwd default 2255. Home has 6 cards; admin panel has 5 cards. /medicines screen requires a caregiver to be selected before posting a purchase (frontend validation via Alert). Reports include purchases[] and insights.concerns with 'Sem registro de X no dia DD/MM/YYYY' for missing days. NOTE: The Expo tunnel (ngrok) initially returned 502 on this run — had to supervisorctl restart expo and wait ~90s. If the preview URL returns 502 on initial navigation, restart expo via sudo supervisorctl restart expo and retry.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only infra note: preview URL returned 502 at start of frontend run due to a transient ngrok tunnel failure (CommandError: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'body')). A single 'sudo supervisorctl restart expo' + 90s wait fully recovered it, and all subsequent flows loaded within timeout.
